name: Barbara Dane
abstract: Barbara Jean Spillman (May 12, 1927 – October 20, 2024), known professionally as Barbara Dane, was an American folk, blues and jazz singer, guitarist, record producer, and political activist. She co-founded Paredon Records with Irwin Silber.

about_quotes.speaker: Gerald Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: I had Bobby Darin – had an album with Bobby Darin, Barbara Dane, um let’s see who did I – Nancy Wilson was my – I had made Nancy Wilson’s first hit for her.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gerald Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
